title: GatesSpec
description:
A gate specification loaded from `gates.toml` in a directory-based spec.

Parallel to [`crate::Spec`] but designed for the directory layout where
criteria live in `gates.toml` alongside a `spec.toml`.

criteria.description: Gate criteria that must be satisfied.

description.description: Human-readable description. Defaults to empty string.

name.description: Display name for this gate spec (must match directory name / feature spec name).

GateCriterion.description:
A single gate criterion with optional requirement traceability.

Extends the concept of [`crate::Criterion`] with a `requirements` field
that links criteria to specific requirement IDs (e.g., `REQ-FUNC-001`).

cmd.description: Optional shell command to verify this criterion.

description.description: Detailed description of what this criterion checks.

requirements.description: Requirement IDs this criterion traces to (e.g., `["REQ-FUNC-001"]`).

timeout.description: Optional timeout in seconds for this criterion's command.
